items.title: Israeli police block Latin Patriarch from Palm Sunday mass in Jerusalem
items.dek: Prime Minister Netanyahu said it was a safety measure following recent Iranian strikes.

items.title: Canada's New Democratic Party elects Avi Lewis as its leader
items.dek: Avi Lewis's campaign platform focused on revitalising the struggling left-leaning party and prioritising workers' rights.
